title: DC-DC Charger Architecture
decision: Use the Victron Orion XS 1400 as the accepted Orion XS option for 12V/24V source to 8S/24V LiFePO4 DC-DC charging. Do not use the Orion XS 12/12-50A for the 24V battery bank. Keep the Rivian low-voltage source-current question open until the exact source point and continuous current limit are verified.
openQuestions: What exact Rivian or external DC source will feed the charger?
What continuous input current may be drawn safely from that source?
Will the charger be controlled by remote on/off, source voltage detection, a BMS allow-to-charge signal, or a service switch?
